philosophy.title: Our Philosophy
philosophy.subtitle: We believe the best tools come from understanding real challenges. Spark-Agile was built by someone who has worked alongside teams, experienced the chaos of poorly run ceremonies, and seen what actually helps people do their best work.
philosophy.humanFirstDesc: Built from real experience working with teams, not abstract theories. Every feature solves a problem we've actually faced.
philosophy.activeIntelligenceDesc: Not artificial, but actively intelligent. Our AI learns from agile patterns to provide genuinely useful guidance, not generic responses.
philosophy.teamsOverToolsDesc: Tools should serve people, not the other way around. We focus on reducing friction so you can focus on building great things.
philosophy.honestLimitsDesc: We're young in this space, but we've learned a lot. We'll always be transparent about what works and what we're still improving.
philosophy.quote: Every feature exists because it solved a real problem. Nothing is added just to impress.

conversations.q1: What blockers does my team have this week?
conversations.a1: Based on your standup data: 3 blockers identified. Sarah is waiting on API docs, Mike needs design approval, and the deployment pipeline has a failing test. Want me to prioritize these?
conversations.a2: Looking at your velocity (24 pts/sprint avg) and backlog: I recommend pulling 8 stories totaling 26 points. This includes 2 high-priority bug fixes and 6 feature items. Should I draft the sprint goal?
conversations.a3: 5 team members reported. Key updates: Frontend auth flow complete, backend API 80% done. 1 new blocker (database migration). Overall team velocity on track for sprint commitment.

trustSignals.title: Your Data is Protected by Design
trustSignals.subtitle: Not just promises - these are actual security measures implemented in the platform

creatorStory.title: Built by a Practitioner, Not a Factory
creatorStory.problemDesc: After years managing agile teams, I saw the same pattern: brilliant tools that created more work, not less. Stand-ups became status theater. Retros generated action items that vanished. Sprint planning felt like guesswork wrapped in process.
creatorStory.solutionDesc: Spark-Agile is not another project management tool pretending to be intelligent. It's a cognitive layer that understands agile context, connecting your Jira, GitHub, and Slack to surface what matters before you ask.
creatorStory.philosophyQuote: Active Intelligence, Not Artificial But Genuine
creatorStory.philosophyDesc: AI should amplify your expertise, not replace your judgment. Every feature is designed to give you time back, not add another dashboard to check.
creatorStory.honestDesc: Spark-Agile is growing. Some integrations are "Coming Soon." I won't pretend otherwise. What exists works because it was built from real needs, not feature checklists.

footer.description: AI-powered agile ceremonies and team management

hero.title: Every Feature Solves a Real Problem
hero.subtitle: Spark-Agile is built around the pain points that slow teams down. Here's how every capability maps to a problem you're facing today.

scatteredTools.title: Scattered Tools, Zero Visibility
scatteredTools.description: Juggling Jira, Trello, spreadsheets, and Slack wastes time and kills context. Spark-Agile gives you one native ecosystem.

nativeBoard.title: Native Kanban & Sprint Board
nativeBoard.description: Built-in Kanban, Sprint, and Backlog boards with drag-and-drop, WIP limits, and swimlanes - no external tools needed.

epicLifecycle.title: Epic Lifecycle Management
epicLifecycle.description: Full epic tracking with Gantt charts, milestones, burndown analytics, ROI dashboards, and closure workflows.

commandCentre.title: Project Command Centre
commandCentre.description: A unified dashboard with real-time task stages, risk registers, lessons learned, and AI-powered project insights.

meetingChaos.title: Meeting Chaos & Wasted Ceremonies
meetingChaos.description: Standups that drag on, retros that go nowhere, and sprint reviews nobody prepares for. Spark-Agile automates the busywork.

aiStandup.title: AI Standup Summaries
aiStandup.description: Gemini-powered summaries that capture blockers, progress, and action items automatically from async updates.

ceremonies.title: Sprint Ceremonies Suite
ceremonies.description: Dedicated tools for Sprint Planning, Review Coordination, and Retrospective Insights - all AI-assisted.

googleCalendar.title: Google Calendar Sync
googleCalendar.description: Automatically push ceremony schedules to Google Calendar with attendee management and smart reminders.

manualReporting.title: Manual Reporting & Status Updates
manualReporting.description: Hours spent compiling reports that are outdated by the time they're sent. Spark-Agile generates them in seconds.

executiveDigest.title: Executive Digest
executiveDigest.description: AI-generated daily and weekly digests summarising sprint health, risks, wins, and recommendations - delivered automatically.

advancedAnalytics.title: Advanced Analytics
advancedAnalytics.description: Velocity trends, commitment delivery charts, workflow execution metrics, and flow analytics - all auto-calculated.

retroInsights.title: Retrospective Insights
retroInsights.description: AI analyses retro feedback to surface patterns, generate action items, and track improvement over time.

aiBoltOn.title: AI is a Bolt-on, Not Built-in
aiBoltOn.description: Most PM tools treat AI as an afterthought. Spark-Agile's AI Co-Pilot is woven into every workflow.

aiCopilot.title: AI Co-Pilot (Gemini-powered)
aiCopilot.description: User story generation, point estimation, blocker detection, and sprint forecasting - directly inside your board.

multiAgent.title: Multi-Agent AI Debate
multiAgent.description: Multiple AI agents debate trade-offs on sprint scope, technical decisions, and risk mitigation - then reach consensus.

backlogHealth.title: Backlog Health Analysis
backlogHealth.description: AI scans your backlog for stale items, missing acceptance criteria, and priority misalignment.

stakeholderComms.title: Stakeholders Left in the Dark
stakeholderComms.description: Executives asking 'where are we?' and teams scrambling to create decks. Spark-Agile keeps everyone informed automatically.

portal.title: Stakeholder Portal
portal.description: A dedicated view for stakeholders with progress dashboards, approval workflows, and digest subscriptions.

approvals.title: Approval Workflows
approvals.description: Structured approval requests with priority levels, due dates, and email notifications to keep decisions moving.

teamCollab.title: Team Collaboration
teamCollab.description: Real-time presence indicators, team member management, and role-based access across all project workspaces.

scalingAgile.title: Scaling Agile is Painful
scalingAgile.description: Scaling from one team to an enterprise programme needs more than sticky notes. Spark-Agile supports SAFe out of the box.

safe.title: SAFe Workflows
safe.description: Value streams, Agile Release Trains, and Program Increment planning - built for enterprise-scale agility.

i18n.title: 9-Language Support
i18n.description: Full localisation across English, French, German, Spanish, Portuguese, Arabic, Japanese, Korean, and Chinese.

security.title: Enterprise-Grade Security
security.description: 196+ RLS policies, AES-256 token encryption, GDPR compliance, and comprehensive audit logging.

cta.title: Ready to Transform Your Delivery?
cta.subtitle: All features included. No credit card. No API keys. Just sign in and start.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Find answers to common questions about Spark-Agile
faq.cantFind: Can't find what you're looking for? Get in touch with our support team.
faq.a1: Spark-Agile is your AI Chief of Staff - a Command Centre for Remote Teams. It is the "missing cognitive layer" that unifies context from all your tools (GitHub, Jira, Slack, Outlook) and delivers actionable insights in 5 minutes. No more tool chaos, no more missed updates.
faq.q2: How does the AI assistance work?
faq.a2intro: Spark-Agile uses a multi-agent AI system powered by Gemini:
faq.a2omair: Omair: Your support assistant for onboarding and platform help
faq.a2copilot: AI Co-Pilot: Generates user stories, estimates story points, detects blockers, and forecasts sprints
faq.a2debate: Multi-Agent Debate: Specialist agents debate decisions from different perspectives to reach consensus
faq.a2specialist: Specialist Agents: Dedicated agents for retrospective insights, sprint planning, standup summaries, and GitHub digests
faq.a2outro: All agents share project context and persist recommendations for continuous learning.
faq.q3: Do I need to install anything?
faq.a3: No installation required! Spark-Agile is a cloud-based web application. Simply create an account and access it through your browser. We handle all infrastructure and updates automatically. It works on mobile, tablet, and desktop with full iOS compatibility.
faq.a4: Spark-Agile supports 9 languages with a fully localised interface: English, Spanish, French, German, Portuguese, Chinese, Japanese, Arabic (with RTL support), and Korean. You can switch languages anytime from the language selector in the navigation.
faq.q5: What's included in the Native PM Ecosystem?
faq.a5intro: Spark-Agile includes a complete project management system:
faq.a5kanban: Kanban Boards: Visual task management with customisable columns and WIP limits
faq.a5sprint: Sprint Management: Plan, track, and review sprints with velocity tracking
faq.a5backlog: Backlog Tracking: Prioritise and manage your product backlog with AI health analysis
faq.a5task: Task Management: Create, assign, and track tasks with full activity history
faq.a5epic: Epic Lifecycle: End-to-end epic management with ROI tracking, milestones, and closure workflows
faq.a5outro: This means Spark-Agile works as a standalone tool. External integrations like Jira are optional.
faq.q6: What can the AI Co-Pilot do?
faq.a6intro: The AI Co-Pilot (powered by Gemini) provides four key actions:
faq.a6stories: Generate User Stories: Create well-structured user stories from requirements
faq.a6points: Estimate Story Points: AI-powered estimation based on historical data
faq.a6blockers: Detect Blockers: Proactively identify potential roadblocks
faq.a6forecast: Forecast Sprints: Predict sprint outcomes based on velocity and capacity
faq.a6outro: Additionally, specialist agents provide retrospective insights, standup summaries, sprint planning assistance, and executive digests.
faq.a7intro: Spark-Agile integrates with the tools your team already uses:
faq.a7jira: Jira: Sync backlog items, sprints, and issues
faq.a7github: GitHub: Track commits, PRs, and repository activity with automated digests
faq.a7outlook: Microsoft Outlook: Create calendar events for ceremonies
faq.a7teams: Microsoft Teams: Send notifications and updates
faq.a7slack: Slack: Team notifications and channel updates
faq.a7outro: Users manage their own Personal Access Tokens for secure, per-user integration.
faq.aCeremoniesIntro: Spark-Agile supports a full suite of Agile ceremonies:
faq.aCeremoniesStandup: Daily Standups: Structured updates with AI-generated summaries
faq.aCeremoniesPlanning: Sprint Planning: AI-assisted capacity planning and story assignment
faq.aCeremoniesReview: Sprint Reviews: Track completed work with automated wrap-up reports
faq.aCeremoniesRetro: Retrospectives: Collect feedback and generate AI-powered insights
faq.aCeremoniesBacklog: Backlog Refinement: AI health analysis and story estimation
faq.aCeremoniesOutro: All ceremonies can be scheduled with Outlook calendar integration and automated reminders.
faq.aStakeholderIntro: The Stakeholder Portal provides executives and stakeholders with:
faq.aStakeholderDashboard: Executive Dashboards: High-level project health and progress views
faq.aStakeholderDigest: Digest Subscriptions: Automated email digests on a schedule you choose
faq.aStakeholderApproval: Approval Workflows: Review and approve scope changes and epic closures
faq.aStakeholderAlert: Alert Configuration: Set up notifications for budget, timeline, and quality thresholds
faq.aSecurityRLS: 196+ RLS Policies: Row-Level Security ensures complete data isolation
faq.aSecurityEncryption: AES-256-GCM Encryption: All sensitive data and integration tokens encrypted at rest
faq.aSecurityGDPR: GDPR Compliance: Full data privacy controls, consent management, and data export
faq.aSecurityAudit: Immutable Audit Logs: All security-sensitive operations are logged with tamper-proof records
faq.aSecurityPrompt: Prompt Injection Protection: Role enforcement, character limits, and regex-based detection
faq.qAccess: Who can see my project data?
faq.aAccessIntro: Only allocated project members can see project data. Key access rules:
faq.aAccessRegister: New users must register and be approved
faq.aAccessAdmin: Admin permission required for profile acceptance and validation
faq.aAccessAllocated: Only allocated project data is visible to each member
faq.aAccessRoles: Role-based permissions control what actions users can perform
faq.aAccessTokens: Integration tokens are encrypted and only accessible server-side
faq.qSignup: How do I sign up and get started?
faq.aSignupIntro: Click "Get Started" and create an account with your email. After email verification:
faq.aSignupWorkspace: Create your first workspace and project
faq.aSignupManage: Start managing your project with AI assistance
faq.qFreeTier: What's included in the free tier?
faq.aFreeTierIntro: The free tier includes generous limits for teams:
faq.aFreeTier3: Up to 15 team members per project
faq.aFreeTier4: Full AI Co-Pilot access (story generation, estimation, blocker detection, forecasting)
faq.aFreeTier5: All native PM features (Kanban, Sprints, Backlog, Epics)
faq.aFreeTier6: All integrations (Jira, GitHub, Outlook, Teams, Slack)
faq.aRateLimitsIntro: Yes, API rate limits ensure fair usage:
faq.aRateLimitsOutro: AI-specific endpoints have additional tiered limits to manage costs.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.introText1: Welcome to Spark-Agile. We are committed to protecting your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and safeguard your information when you use Spark-Agile.
privacy.introText2: As a micro-studio, we take data protection seriously and comply with GDPR and other applicable data protection laws.
privacy.personalInfoDesc: We collect information that you provide directly to us, including:
privacy.usageDataDesc: We automatically collect certain information about your device and how you interact with our service:
privacy.projectDataDesc: When you use our platform, we collect and process:
privacy.sprintData: Sprint planning data and backlog information
privacy.integrationData: Integration data from JIRA, GitHub, and Microsoft services
privacy.howWeUseDesc: We use the information we collect to:
privacy.provideMaintain: Provide, maintain, and improve our services
privacy.processTransactions: Process transactions and send related information
privacy.monitorAnalyze: Monitor and analyze usage patterns and trends
privacy.detectPrevent: Detect, prevent, and address technical issues and fraud
privacy.dataSharingDesc: We may share your information in the following circumstances:
privacy.teamMembers: With your team members: Project data is shared with authorized team members within your workspace
privacy.serviceProviders: Service providers: We use trusted third-party services including cloud hosting, payment processing, and analytics
privacy.businessTransfers: Business transfers: In connection with any merger, sale, or acquisition
privacy.legalRequirements: Legal requirements: When required by law or to protect our rights
privacy.dataSecurityDesc: We implement industry-standard security measures to protect your information:
privacy.encryptionTransitRest: Encryption of data in transit and at rest
privacy.rlsSecurity: Row-level security and role-based access control
privacy.accessUpdateDelete: Access, update, or delete your personal information
privacy.exportData: Export your data in a portable format
privacy.disableCookies: Disable cookies through your browser settings
privacy.requestDeletion: Request deletion of your account and associated data
privacy.dataRetentionDesc: We retain your information for as long as necessary to provide our services and comply with legal obligations. When you delete your account, we will delete or anonymize your data within 30 days, except where we are required to retain it by law.
privacy.internationalTransfersDesc: Your information may be transferred to and processed in countries other than your country of residence. We ensure appropriate safeguards are in place to protect your data in accordance with this Privacy Policy.
privacy.childrensPrivacyDesc: Our services are not intended for individuals under the age of 18. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children. If you become aware that a child has provided us with personal information, please contact us.
privacy.changesToPolicyDesc: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify you of any material changes by posting the new policy on this page and updating the "Last updated" date. Your continued use of our services after such changes constitutes your acceptance of the updated policy.
privacy.gdprComplianceDesc: If you are in the European Economic Area (EEA), you have additional rights under GDPR:
privacy.rightAccess: Right to access your personal data
privacy.rightRectification: Right to rectification of inaccurate data
privacy.rightErasure: Right to erasure ("right to be forgotten")
privacy.rightWithdraw: Right to withdraw consent at any time
privacy.exerciseRights: To exercise these rights, please contact us using the information below.
privacy.contactInfoDesc: If you have questions or concerns about this Privacy Policy or want to exercise your rights, please contact us at:

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.acceptanceDesc: Welcome to Spark-Agile. By accessing and using this Service, you accept and agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree to these terms, please do not use the Service.
terms.operatedBy: Spark-Agile is committed to providing quality AI-powered Agile tools.
terms.descriptionDesc: Spark-Agile provides an AI-powered Scrum Master assistant platform that helps teams with:
terms.integrationServices: Integration with JIRA, GitHub, and Microsoft services
terms.registrationDesc: You must create an account to use our Service. You agree to provide accurate, current, and complete information during registration and to update such information to keep it accurate, current, and complete.
terms.accountSecurityDesc: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials and for all activities that occur under your account. You agree to notify us immediately of any unauthorized use of your account.
terms.accountTerminationDesc: We reserve the right to suspend or terminate your account if you violate these Terms of Service or engage in activities that may harm the Service or other users.
terms.subscriptionPlansDesc: We offer various subscription plans with different features and pricing. Details of each plan are available on our pricing page.
terms.paymentTermsDesc: Subscription fees are billed in advance on a monthly or yearly basis. All payments are processed securely through Stripe. You authorize us to charge your payment method for all fees incurred.
terms.refundPolicyDesc: We offer a 14-day money-back guarantee for new subscriptions. Refund requests must be submitted within 14 days of the initial purchase. No refunds are provided for partial subscription periods or downgrades.
terms.cancellationDesc: You may cancel your subscription at any time. Upon cancellation, you will retain access to the Service until the end of your current billing period.
terms.userResponsibilitiesDesc: As a user of Spark-Agile, you are responsible for:
terms.maintainSecurity: Maintaining the security of your account credentials
terms.ensureAccuracy: Ensuring all information you provide is accurate and current
terms.complyLaws: Using the Service in compliance with applicable laws and regulations
terms.reviewAI: Reviewing and validating AI-generated content before use in critical decisions
terms.respectIP: Respecting the intellectual property rights of others
terms.noReverseEngineer: Not attempting to reverse engineer, hack, or disrupt the Service
terms.noIllegalUse: Not using the Service for illegal or harmful purposes
terms.ourRightsDesc: The Service, including its original content, features, and functionality, is owned by Spark-Agile and is protected by international copyright, trademark, and other intellectual property laws.
terms.yourContentDesc: You retain all rights to the data and content you submit to the Service. By submitting content, you grant us a non-exclusive, worldwide, royalty-free license to use, store, and process your content solely for providing and improving the Service.
terms.aiGeneratedContentDesc: Our Service uses AI to generate insights, summaries, and recommendations. While we strive for accuracy, AI-generated content may contain errors or inaccuracies. You are responsible for reviewing and validating all AI-generated content before use in critical decision-making.
terms.thirdPartyIntegrationsDesc: Our Service integrates with third-party platforms (JIRA, GitHub, Microsoft services). Your use of these integrations is subject to the respective third-party terms of service. We are not responsible for the availability, accuracy, or reliability of third-party services.
terms.disclaimerOfWarrantiesDesc: THE SERVICE IS PROVIDED "AS IS" AND "AS AVAILABLE" WITHOUT WARRANTIES OF ANY KIND, EITHER EXPRESS OR IMPLIED. WE DO NOT WARRANT THAT THE SERVICE WILL BE UNINTERRUPTED, ERROR-FREE, OR COMPLETELY SECURE.
terms.limitationOfLiabilityDesc: TO THE MAXIMUM EXTENT PERMITTED BY LAW, SPARK-AGILE SHALL NOT BE LIABLE FOR ANY INDIRECT, INCIDENTAL, SPECIAL, CONSEQUENTIAL, OR PUNITIVE DAMAGES, OR ANY LOSS OF PROFITS OR REVENUES, WHETHER INCURRED DIRECTLY OR INDIRECTLY.
terms.indemnificationDesc: You agree to indemnify and hold harmless Spark-Agile from any claims, losses, damages, liabilities, and expenses arising out of your use of the Service or violation of these Terms.
terms.changesToTermsDesc: We reserve the right to modify these Terms at any time. We will notify users of material changes via email or through the Service. Your continued use of the Service after such modifications constitutes acceptance of the updated Terms.
terms.governingLawDesc: These Terms shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of England and Wales, without regard to its conflict of law provisions.
terms.contactInfoDesc: If you have questions about these Terms, we're here to help. Please contact us at:
